mapper.select: SELECT t.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_contractor_eval_item i WHERE i.template_id = t.id) AS item_count FROM tb_contractor_eval_template t WHERE t.is_active = 1 ORDER BY t.sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_contractor_eval_item ( template_id, sort_order, work_content, eval_category, risk_factor, disaster_type, is_na, current_measures, current_frequency, current_severity, current_risk, risk_grade, improvement, edu_frequency, post_frequency, post_severity, post_risk ) VALUES ( #{templateId}, #{sortOrder}, #{workContent}, #{evalCategory}, #{riskFactor}, #{disasterType}, #{isNa}, #{currentMeasures}, #{currentFrequency}, #{currentSeverity}, #{currentRisk}, #{riskGrade}, #{improvement}, #{eduFrequency}, #{postFrequency}, #{postSeverity}, #{postRisk} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_contractor_eval_item SET sort_order = #{sortOrder}, work_content = #{workContent}, eval_category = #{evalCategory}, risk_factor = #{riskFactor}, disaster_type = #{disasterType}, is_na = #{isNa}, current_measures = #{currentMeasures}, current_frequency = #{currentFrequency}, current_severity = #{currentSeverity}, current_risk = #{currentRisk}, risk_grade = #{riskGrade}, improvement = #{improvement}, edu_frequency = #{eduFrequency}, post_frequency = #{postFrequency}, post_severity = #{postSeverity}, post_risk = #{postRisk} WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE tb_contractor_eval_template SET template_name = #{templateName}, description = #{description}, evaluator_name = #{evaluatorName}, evaluator_sign = #{evaluatorSign}, approver_name = #{approverName}, approver_sign = #{approverSign}, sign_date = #{signDate}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
